frame_label: Prenup / Alimony as Reverse Dowry / Women as Golddiggers
generated_comment: Bro honestly, aajkal shaadi bhi risky investment lagti hai for men. One bad match and then alimony, 498A drama, full life set for the girl on your money — prenup jaisa system India mein normal hona chahiye, otherwise men are just exposed.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it frames women as financially exploitative in marriage and divorce, and presents men as the primary victims of supposedly one-sided laws. It encodes the 'reverse dowry/alimony' and '498A misuse' manifestations, while using a men's-rights concern framing rather than direct abuse.
persona_text: You are Mohit. Age 27. A junior employee at a tech startup in Bengaluru. You are in the office cafeteria having lunch with three male colleagues after your female engineering manager just led a very strong all hands presentation. One colleague says she was impressive. You are responding and giving your actual opinion of her.
